title: Style
text: Style This property determines the appearance of the split bar. Valid values are Normal (default), Narrow , Thin , or Hidden . Value Description Normal Three-dimensional bar with a width of 7 pixels. Narrow Narrower three-dimensional bar. Thin Dark gray bar with a width of one pixel. Hidden Bar that is hidden at run time. During development, a hidden bar appears as a dashed line. Applies To Split Bars Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
